{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager",
  "description": "Global Linkers Limited - Our client, a fast-growing company in the Food &amp; Beverage industry, is recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: General Manager

Job Location: Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a highly experienced, strategic, and results-oriented General Manager to lead our operations and drive business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide overall leadership and direction for the company&rsquo;s operations.
	Develop and implement strategic plans to achieve business objectives.
	Oversee sales, distribution, production, finance, and administrative functions.
	Drive revenue growth, profitability, and operational efficiency.
	Ensure compliance with industry regulations and company policies.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers, distributors, suppliers, and stakeholders.
	Lead, mentor, and motivate management and staff teams.
	Monitor business performance and prepare reports for executive decision-making.
	Identify new market opportunities and support business expansion initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, Marketing, or a related field.
	8&ndash;10 years of experience in a managerial or leadership role, preferably within the Food &amp; Beverage industry.
	A Master&rsquo;s degree (MBA or related qualification) will be an added advantage.
	Strong business acumen and strategic planning skills.
	Proven track record of driving growth and improving operational performance.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong financial and analytical capabilities.
	Ability to&nbsp;work effectively in a hybrid work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: apply@globallinkersltd.com using &quot;General Manager &ndash; Abeokuta&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-24",

  },

General Manager Job at Global Linkers Limited




        
    

        
        Global Linkers Limited - Our client, a fast-growing company in the Food & Beverage industry, is recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: General Manager

Job Location: Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a highly experienced, strategic, and results-oriented General Manager to lead our operations and drive business growth.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Provide overall leadership and direction for the company’s operations.
	Develop and implement strategic plans to achieve business objectives.
	Oversee sales, distribution, production, finance, and administrative functions.
	Drive revenue growth, profitability, and operational efficiency.
	Ensure compliance with industry regulations and company policies.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers, distributors, suppliers, and stakeholders.
	Lead, mentor, and motivate management and staff teams.
	Monitor business performance and prepare reports for executive decision-making.
	Identify new market opportunities and support business expansion initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, Marketing, or a related field.
	8–10 years of experience in a managerial or leadership role, preferably within the Food & Beverage industry.
	A Master’s degree (MBA or related qualification) will be an added advantage.
	Strong business acumen and strategic planning skills.
	Proven track record of driving growth and improving operational performance.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong financial and analytical capabilities.
	Ability to work effectively in a hybrid work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "General Manager – Abeokuta" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Hotel experience is a must: Minimum 1 year.
	Minimum of 2 years in the procurement field.
	Materials Control (MC) &amp; ERP systems knowledge is an added advantage.
	Pre-opening experience is an added advantage.


Method of application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter CV to: job@thenordicabuja.com using the Job Positon as the subject of the email.",

Procurement Officer Job at Nordic Hotels




        
    

        
        Nordic Hotels - With beautiful rooms and suites, we offer peaceful and pleasant surroundings for both business and leisure travelers.

Nordic Hotel combines distinctive modern Scandinavian design with exquisite service and comfort. Our prime objective is to provide our guests with a desirable and comfortable environment away from home. Simply put: We want to be the best hotels in Nigeria.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

            
    




	Hotel experience is a must: Minimum 1 year.
	Minimum of 2 years in the procurement field.
	Materials Control (MC) & ERP systems knowledge is an added advantage.
	Pre-opening experience is an added advantage.


Method of application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter CV to: [email protected] using the Job Positon as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Front Desk Executive Job at VVS Gym




        
    

        
        VVS Gym is committed to providing world-class fitness experience through exceptional service, professionalism, and operational excellence.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Executive

title: Job Openings at Sterling Health HMO

title: Job Openings at Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS)
content:
Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) is a professional recruitment agency and business support service dedicated to helping entrepreneurs, small businesses, and busy professionals streamline their operations. We specialize in administrative support, customer service, social media management, recruitment assistance with onboarding, and business/company branding. Our mission is to help clients save time, enhance productivity, and build strong, recognizable brands while they focus on growing their businesses.

We are  recruiting to fill the following positions below: 

1.) Social Media Manager

Job Location:  Remote
Employment Type: Full-time
     

            
    



Description


	We are looking for a creative, organized, and results-driven Social Media Manager.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for managing the client's YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook accounts, creating engaging content, supporting daily YouTube Live sessions, and maintaining an active online community.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage and maintain the company's YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook accounts daily.
	Join and support the company's YouTube Live session every morning.
	Create, edit, and publish 7 content pieces daily, comprising:
	
		3 videos
		2 carousel posts
		1 storytelling post
		1 quote card, picture post, or text-based post
	
	
	Design engaging graphics and edit videos in line with the brand's identity.
	Write compelling captions, hashtags, and calls to action for all published content.
	Develop and maintain weekly and monthly content calendars.
	Schedule and publish content according to the approved posting plan.
	Respond promptly to customer inquiries and messages through the company's WhatsApp Community.
	Research social media trends and incorporate relevant ideas to improve engagement and reach.
	Ensure all content aligns with the company's brand guidelines and marketing objectives.
	Meet all content deadlines while maintaining consistency in quality and posting frequency.


Requirements


	Proven experience managing social media accounts for a business or brand.
	Proficiency in Canva, CapCut, or similar graphic design and video editing tools.
	Strong copywriting and communication skills.
	Ability to create engaging short-form video content.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Reliable internet connection and a suitable device for remote  work.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 7th August, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Social media manager Remote" as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Partnership and Business Development Officer

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	As Partnerships & Business Development Officer, you will  work closely with the Founder to drive business growth through strategic networking, LinkedIn marketing, B2B sales outreach, relationship management, and partnership development.
	This role is ideal for someone who enjoys networking, lead generation, business development, relationship-building, and converting opportunities into business conversations.


Responsibilities


	Build and maintain professional relationships with potential clients, partners, and stakeholders
	Develop and execute LinkedIn outreach and networking strategies to increase AVS visibility and generate leads
	Identify, engage, and nurture B2B prospects through strategic outreach
	Support partnership and collaboration initiatives
	Assist with business development and sales activities
	Schedule meetings, discovery calls, and business conversations
	Generate qualified leads and support client acquisition efforts
	Represent AVS professionally in all interactions
	Maintain accurate records, CRM updates, and activity reports
	Work towards agreed business development and partnership targets


Requirements


	Proven experience in LinkedIn marketing, LinkedIn lead generation, or LinkedIn outreach
	Experience in B2B sales, business development, partnership management, or client acquisition
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong interpersonal and relationship-building abilities
	Highly organized, proactive, and results-driven
	Comfortable initiating conversations and building relationships with decision-makers
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Eperience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, CRM tools, or lead generation tools is an advantage.


Why Join AVS?


	Salary: N100,000 Monthly + Performance Bonuses + Commission.
	Direct mentorship from the Founder
	Opportunity to contribute to a growing company
	Performance-based bonuses and commissions
	 Clear career progression pathway
	Opportunity to grow into a leadership role as the company expands.


Application Closing Date: 22nd July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested candidates should Send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Driver

Job Location: Asokoro, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Avocado Virtual Solutions is recruiting a responsible and experienced Driver on behalf of a client in Abuja.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for safely transporting the employer, maintaining the assigned vehicle, and carrying out official transportation-related duties while demonstrating professionalism, punctuality, and integrity.


Key Responsibilities


	Safely transport the employer from the residence in Asokoro to the office in Garki and other assigned locations.
	Ensure the assigned vehicle is always clean, properly maintained, and in good working condition.
	Adhere to all traffic regulations and maintain safe driving practices at all times.
	Run official errands and assist with transportation-related duties as assigned.
	Report any vehicle faults or maintenance needs promptly.
	Ensure timely arrival for all scheduled trips.


Requirements


	Minimum of an SSCE qualification.
	Minimum of 2 years of professional driving experience.
	Valid driver's licence with the ability to drive manual (standard) vehicles.
	Good knowledge of Abuja road networks.
	Strong sense of responsibility, punctuality, and professionalism.
	Must be a Christian.


Salary
N80,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 28th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and driver's license to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply
